entry.content:
Welcome to CharmingZhang!

这里是我在 GitHub Pages 上的个人博客，用来记录开发笔记、项目想法和生活片段。

关于我

欢迎访问我的 GitHub 了解近期动态。

近期项目

我在维护 npm 包 wise-map，欢迎试用与反馈。
entry.summary:
Welcome to CharmingZhang!

entry.title: 欢迎来到我的博客

entry.content:

entry.title: 本站说明

entry.content:
Web development is an exciting field that combines creativity with technical skills. In this post, I’ll introduce you to the basics of web development.

The Three Pillars of Web Development

HTML - The Structure

HTML (HyperText Markup Language) provides the structure of web pages. It uses tags to define different elements like headings, paragraphs, links, and images.

CSS - The Styling

CSS (Cascading Style Sheets) is used to style and layout HTML elements. It allows you to control colors, fonts, spacing, and more.

JavaScript - The Interactivity

JavaScript adds interactivity to web pages. It allows you to respond to user events and manipulate the DOM dynamically.

Modern Web Development

Today’s web development involves:

  • Frameworks: React, Vue, Angular make development easier
  • Tools: Webpack, Babel help with bundling and transpilation
  • Testing: Jest, Mocha ensure code quality
  • Version Control: Git keeps track of changes

Best Practices

  1. Write semantic HTML for better accessibility
  2. Use CSS frameworks like Bootstrap for faster development
  3. Follow the DRY (Don’t Repeat Yourself) principle
  4. Test your code thoroughly
  5. Keep your code clean and well-organized

Web development is a continuous learning journey. Start with the basics and gradually expand your skills!
entry.summary: Web development is an exciting field that combines creativity with technical skills. In this post, I’ll introduce you to the basics of we
entry.title: Introduction to Web Development

entry.content:
In today’s fast-paced world, productivity is key to success. Here are some practical tips to help you work more efficiently and accomplish your goals.

1. Start Your Day with a Clear Plan

Before diving into work, take 10-15 minutes to plan your day. Identify your top 3 priorities and focus on completing them first.

2. Use the Pomodoro Technique

The Pomodoro Technique involves:

  • Working for 25 minutes (one “pomodoro”)
  • Taking a 5-minute break
  • After 4 pomodoros, take a longer 15-30 minute break

This method helps maintain focus and prevents burnout.

3. Minimize Distractions

  • Turn off notifications on your phone and computer
  • Use website blockers to avoid time-wasting sites
  • Close unnecessary browser tabs and applications
  • Find a quiet workspace if possible

4. Take Regular Breaks

Your brain needs rest to function optimally. Step away from your desk, stretch, or take a walk. You’ll return to work refreshed and more focused.

5. Learn to Say No

Not every task deserves your time and energy. Be selective about commitments and focus on what aligns with your goals.

6. Automate Repetitive Tasks

Look for opportunities to automate routine work:

  • Use templates for common documents
  • Set up automation tools for repetitive workflows
  • Batch similar tasks together

7. Keep Your Workspace Organized

A clean workspace promotes clear thinking. Organize your files, both digital and physical.

8. Review and Adjust

At the end of each day, reflect on:

  • What went well?
  • What could be improved?
  • What will you focus on tomorrow?

9. Invest in Your Skills

Continuous learning makes you more efficient:

  • Take courses to learn new tools
  • Read books and articles in your field
  • Practice new techniques

10. Practice Self-Care

Don’t neglect:

  • Adequate sleep (7-9 hours)
  • Regular exercise
  • Healthy nutrition
  • Mental health and relaxation

Remember, productivity isn’t about doing more—it’s about doing what matters most effectively. Start with one or two tips and gradually incorporate more into your routine.
entry.summary: In today’s fast-paced world, productivity is key to success. Here are some practical tips to help you work more efficiently and accomplis
entry.title: Tips for Better Productivity
